duration.$description: Hover transition duration — fast (160ms)、 small surface motion で 「変化が現れる」 感

easing.$description: Hover transition easing — ease-out で 「登場 → 落ち着く」 (Material 3 default)

duration.$description: Press transition duration — instant (80ms) で micro feedback、 押下の即時感

easing.$description: Press transition easing — ease-in で 「押し込み」 (急停止)

duration.$description: Toggle transition duration — normal (220ms) で滑らかな state change

easing.$description: Toggle transition easing — in-out で両端滑らか (radio / checkbox / switch / segmented)

duration.$description: Focus ring transition duration — instant (80ms) で keyboard tab に即応

easing.$description: Focus ring transition easing — ease-out で「ring が現れる」

duration.$description: Dropdown / popover / tooltip duration — fast (160ms) で軽快な登場

easing.$description: Dropdown easing — ease-out で 「ふわっと出る」

duration.$description: Modal entry duration — slow (320ms) で「落ち着いた登場」 (modal / drawer / dialog)

easing.$description: Modal entry easing — ease-out で fast → slow (前面に現れて止まる)

duration.$description: Modal exit duration — normal (220ms) で「素早く消える」

easing.$description: Modal exit easing — ease-in で slow → fast (退場、 引っ込む)

duration.$description: Page route transition duration — normal (220ms) で滑らかな移動

easing.$description: Page transition easing — in-out で両端滑らか (route 変化)

duration.$description: Frame system morph duration — slow (320ms)、 Creo brand identity の「呼吸」

easing.$description: Frame morph easing — spring で Creo brand bouncy (3D depth metaphor articulate)

duration.$description: Skeleton shimmer duration — lazy (480ms) で loading の cumulative motion

easing.$description: Skeleton shimmer easing — linear で「途切れない流れ」 (loading は時間流動)

duration.$description: Progress indeterminate bar duration — lazy (480ms) で end-less cumulative motion

easing.$description: Progress indeterminate easing — linear で constant velocity (途中 progress 表現)
